Sarasota FHA Loans

FHA loans in Sarasota, Florida

Buy a home in Sarasota with as little as 3.5% down. Here's how FHA loans work in Sarasota County, where FHA fits in this arts-and-beach market, and how to get pre-approved.

Sarasota Home Loans

FHA loans in Sarasota, Florida

Sarasota is known for its arts scene and the white sand of Siesta Key, and its market spans pricey coastal properties and far more attainable inland communities like Palmer Ranch and Gulf Gate. FHA buyers do well here by focusing inland and on condos, where the statewide loan limit covers most homes, while the priciest beachfront properties tend to sit above FHA's reach.

Sarasota County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Sarasota

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Sarasota home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). That covers most inland Sarasota homes and many condos, though beachfront and luxury coastal properties often exceed it. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Sarasota County's exact figure with HUD.

Where FHA works best in the Sarasota market

Coastal Sarasota and barrier-island properties are often beyond FHA limits, but the loan works well across the mainland — Palmer Ranch, Gulf Gate, and similar communities — and on many condos (confirm the building is FHA-approved or qualifies for Single-Unit Approval; see our condo guide). We'll help you target the Sarasota homes that fit your FHA budget and get you pre-approved first.

Down payment help for Sarasota buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Sarasota buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Sarasota County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Sarasota

We help buyers throughout Sarasota and Sarasota County, including Downtown, Gulf Gate, Palmer Ranch, and the Siesta Key area. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Sarasota County for 2026?+
Sarasota County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most inland Sarasota homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Can I use FHA on the beach in Sarasota?+
Beachfront and barrier-island properties often exceed FHA limits, but FHA works well on the mainland and for many condos. We'll help you find homes that fit.
Can I buy a Sarasota condo with FHA?+
Yes, if the building is FHA-approved or your unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval. We check before you offer.
How much down payment do I need in Sarasota?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits can help.
Do you serve all of Sarasota County?+
Yes — Sarasota, Venice, North Port, and surrounding communities.
